scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:build && wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --remote --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: npm run cf:build && wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --remote --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.cf:deploy:preview: npm run cf:build && wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --remote --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json --env preview
scripts.seed: npm run pipeline:load -- --reset && npm run db:migrate
scripts.pipeline:ingest: npm run pipeline:normalize && npm run pipeline:cache-assets && npm run pipeline:extract && npm run pipeline:enrich && npm run seed
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --local --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc
